name: tuturuuu
description: Codex operating guidance, CLI support, validation, CI, and focused workflows for the Tuturuuu platform monorepo.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Tuturuuu platform work aligned with repo conventions.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for safe Tuturuuu platform development, including repo-wide workflow rules, native ttr CLI install and task workflows, Flutter mobile task-board guidance, Supabase database patterns, CI/docs maintenance, review-comment follow-through, plugin validation, and incremental tooling improvements.
defaultPrompt: Make this platform change and run the checks it needs.
Install the Tuturuuu CLI and verify ttr login works.
Update the Supabase schema or API write path safely.
Fix this Flutter task-board behavior and verify it.
Update the docs or CI workflow and validate the follow-through.
Clear the unresolved review comments on this PR.
Improve this Tuturuuu development workflow for future agents.
